lines.speaker: Captain Campbell
lines.text: This cannot stand! It's a complete outrage!

lines.speaker: Captain Campbell
lines.text: My ship! The front fell off!

lines.speaker: Captain Campbell
lines.text: Yes! That's not very typical, I'd like to make that point!

lines.speaker: Captain Campbell
lines.text: Well, there are a lot of ships going around the world all the time, and very seldom does anything like this happen!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But then why did it happen to yours?

lines.speaker: Captain Campbell
lines.text: Because of that meteorologist! He didn't provide the usual weather report and we sailed right into a storm!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And as a result the front of your ship fell off? Was your ship not safe?

lines.speaker: Captain Campbell
lines.text: Are you saying it's my fault?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you said yourself that this is quite a seldom occurance.

lines.speaker: Captain Campbell
lines.text: Look, I wouldn't say my ship wasn't safe... It just perhaps wasn't quite as safe as some of the other ones. Some of them are built so the front doesn't fall off at all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see... Well, good luck with getting it all sorted.
